# Studio mobile-first probe fixture

This is a seeded shortform workflow used by `probe-mobile-shortform.mjs` and `smoke-er-viewport-regressions.mjs` to exercise the v7 shortform-review surface. It exists so the probes can drive the Iter/Apprv/Canc bar against a real workflow at the phone viewport.

## Body

A second heading exists so the TOC drawer cell composes (cell omitted only when <2 headings). The markdown deliberately stays short to avoid breaking word-wrap measurements.
